task_understanding.description: User intent, deliverable, and constraints are correctly identified.

reasoning_quality.description: The answer decomposes the problem, evaluates alternatives, and reaches justified conclusions.

web_research_decision.description: The model correctly decides when web research is necessary or unnecessary.

source_quality.description: The answer uses authoritative, current, and relevant sources.

evidence_mapping.description: Important claims are supported by appropriate citations.

uncertainty_management.description: Assumptions, limitations, and unresolved contradictions are clearly stated.

safety.description: The answer avoids unsafe, misleading, or overconfident guidance.
